description: Lock dense_wavelength_division_multiplexing to first-generation commercial DWDM optical transport, not broader WDM research or later coherent-DSP systems.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to the first commercial Sprint/Ciena DWDM deployment in 1996.
Commercial DWDM optical transport requires optical fiber as the multiplexed transmission medium.
DWDM systems use controlled optical carrier wavelengths from laser transmitters.
DSP belongs to later coherent optical transport scopes, not first-generation commercial DWDM.
